item.title: Red, white, blue and gold? Takeaways from Team USA's dominant win over Slovakia
item.description: The 6-2 win sets up a matchup against Canada with the gold medal on the line.

item.title: Top 50 USMNT players of 2026, ranked by club form: Which Americans made the top 10?
item.description: Who are the 50 best American players of 2026 so far? The top 10 sees a shake-up as the USMNT Player Performance Index returns.

item.title: Michigan rode a supersized frontcourt to No. 1 -- now it hopes a title is next
item.description: Starting lineups featuring three former centers? How Dusty May and the Wolverines cracked a winning code.

item.title: 2026 Winter Olympics: U.S. women's curling goes for bronze, Eileen Gu competes in halfpipe and more
item.description: Saturday at the Olympics is headlined by U.S. women's curling going for bronze and Eileen Gu competing in the freeski halfpipe final.

item.title: Olympics men's hockey daily: Canada-USA for gold, Slovakia-Finland for bronze
item.description: Find the schedule, scoring and goaltending leaders and medal round bracket here.
